headline: Is Ford a Meme Stock Now? Wall Street and Retail Can’t Agree
summary: Retail investors on Reddit are calling Ford (NYSE: F) a winner. Wall Street analysts are calling it a hold. That kind of disconnect usually defines a meme stock, so it’s worth asking whether the venerable automaker now belongs in that category, or if retail investors simply recognized the value first. Ford by the Numbers The ... Is Ford a Meme Stock Now? Wall Street and Retail Can’t Agree

headline: How tariffs and slumping EV sales are crippling the 'backbone' of Canada's economy
summary: A third of auto production in this country has disappeared since the pandemic and challenges and competition mount daily. Can the industry survive?

headline: Ford: A Buy Due To The Resilient Ford Pro Division

headline: Stellantis’s Ambitious Overhaul Overshadowed by Ford’s Burst of Energy
summary: Stellantis's $69.6 billion revival plan includes nine North American models priced under $40,000 and refreshes of a dozen others.
